notes:
### Added

- **Agent hooks** — shell hooks at SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, and Notification (workspace `.dntspace/hooks.json` + per-profile Settings → Hooks)
- **Web sign-in** — open browser login, return via `dntspace://` deep link; license gate requires login or key before use
- **Settings → User** — account / license / usage (replaces the old License settings tab)
- Factory reset (dev wipe on next boot) and reload-window confirm dialogs
- Chat polish: worked-for trail collapse, tool taxonomy, debug panel helpers, sessions footer

### Changed

- Settings UI shared cards/sections; license-based BYOK filtering on models
- Sub-session sidebar actions restored; chat timeline/tool card UX polish
- Guide docs: hooks + license/login and related pages

### Notes

- App id remains `com.dntspace.app`; workspace folder remains `.dntspace`
- In-app auto-update from prior signed 0.2.x builds continues via the public feed
